9:37AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. COURT CONVENES FOR CONT'D JURY TRIAL, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT BOTH PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, 12 JURORS PRESENT, 2 ALTERNATES SWORN. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. PLAINTIFF'S CASE BEGINS, ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. PLAINTIFF RESTS. DEFENSE CASE, ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. DEFENSE RESTS. COURT ADJOURNED UNTIL 9:30AM 11/03/94.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT VICERAL, CONRAD

9:47AM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. JURY TRIAL CONTINUES, ALL PARTIES, 12 JURORS AND 2 ALTERNATES PRESENT. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW. CLOSING STATEMENTS BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENSE AND FINAL CLOSING STATEMENTS BY PLAINTIFF. FINAL JURY INSTRUCTION. JURORS RETIRE TO DELIBERATE AND RETURN TO COURT WITH A SPECIAL VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. JURORS POLLED. VERDICT FORM FILED.
